notCheckedIn.title: Not Checked In
notCheckedIn.message: You need to be checked in to vouch for other guests. Please ask a host or a checked-in guest to check you in first.

unauthorized.title: Unauthorized
unauthorized.message: You are not authorized to check in guests for this event. Only hosts and co-hosts can check in guests.

postCheckIn.claim10Desc: Thanks for attending! As a verified guest, you earned a discount.
postCheckIn.discountClaimedSubtitle: Your 10% pizza discount has been used.
postCheckIn.discountUnavailableDesc: This discount is for verified attendees only.
postCheckIn.qrDescription: Show this QR code to a host or checked-in guest to verify your attendance
postCheckIn.qrSubmsg: A host or checked-in guest needs to scan this to check you in
